_comment: Ranker-regression expectations over data/seed.json + data/cooccurrence.json. These are CHARACTERIZATION values (what the deterministic engine currently produces), not hand-picked winners. Update deliberately when the seed graph, co-occurrence, or scoring rubric changes, and record why in an ADR. Phase-1 note: the endpoint-surprise term (-log2 P(endpoint | start) from Wikipedia-link co-occurrence, ADR 0003) now demotes 'obvious' destinations — 'Roman Empire' no longer tops out at Latin (an obvious pairing) but at Chang'an, the Silk Road's eastern terminus in China.
